blocks.text:
4Q, What are aquatic animals? How
is a fish adapted to live in water?

Ans, Animals that live in
water are called aquatic
animals . Fish have:
i, Special organs called gills to
breathe in water.
ii, Streamlined bodies with scales
that make it easier (for them) to move
in water.
iii, Fins and a tail to help them
to swim.
iv, Air bladders to help them
to stay afloat.

5Q, How is a camel adapted to
live in its habitat?

Ans, A camel is adapted to live in
hot and dry conditions.
i, It can drink more than 100
litres of water. This water
is stored in the body and
